name: Boston Brown Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Rye meal or Plain flour
1 cup Sour milk (mix 1 tbsp Vinegar with 1 cup Sweet Milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients in a bowl.
2. Stir in the molasses and sour milk mixture.
- To make sour milk, combine 1 tablespoon of vinegar with 1 cup of sweet milk.
3. Grease two #2 tin cans and place rings of waxed paper in their bottoms.
4. Divide the batter evenly between the two cans.
5. Cover each can with aluminum foil.
6. Place the cans in a kettle of boiling water, ensuring the water level is half way up the sides of the cans.
7. Cook for two hours.
8. When ready to serve, unmold by running a knife around the inside of the can and shaking it out onto a plate.
9. Cut thinly and serve with Boston Baked Beans.
